details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. item_specifications.special_feature: Easy to Clean, Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Water Resistant

about_item: 28D EGG CREAT FOAM: 3.5 inch high 28D egg sponge large dog beds, the sponge is soft and elastic, can support the dog's joints and muscles evenly, especially suitable for older dogs with anxiety and large dogs with arthritis. The classic padded dog cushion offers high loft orthopedic padding as well as a super cozy nesting and digging for dogs and cats.

SMART DESIGNED: this pet bed adopts four-sided wrapping design that provides the dog enough security. The soft and comfortable broken foam arm rest surrounds your pet's neck and head, providing extra comfortable support for your dog's neck and head. Soothing and relaxing to help your dog sleep better.

SOFT SLEEP SURFACE: The sleeping area of the plush dog bed is 34 x 26 inchs, which gives the dog enough space to move. The surface is made of high quality PV plush, which feels comfortable and does not fluff or fade. The materials are gentle on skin, nose and paws.

WATERPROOF & EASY TO CLEAN:Don't worry about getting the memory foam dog bed wet, the washable dog bed cover has a waterproof lining on the back to prevent liquid leakage and protect the foam. Removable cover with zipper support machine washing and low-temperature drying.

NON-SLIP BOTTOM: There are small non-slip rubber particles on the Oxford cloth at the bottom of this extra large dog bed, which can be fixed on the floor to ensure that the dog will not slide easily when playing or sleeping on the dog beds for extra large dogs, providing the dog with a sense of security.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, easy to assemble and wash, and appreciate its perfect size for multiple dogs. The bed is soft yet firm, and customers consider it worth the price. While some customers say it will last a long time, others report it falling apart.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect pet bed for our dog!
authors_reviews.text: I usually wait for awhile before posting a review, but this bed deserves top honors! Instructions said to wait for 24+ hours before using to allow stuffing to fill out completely, but my dog went right into it once I laid it down. He’s so comfortable & is sleeping soundly in it. I love how this bed is firm around edge, yet soft, secure, & the stuffing easily supports his back issues. It was easy to put together, no smell, it’s waterproof, & most importantly, safe for his back, which is what we needed for him. I also like that I can remove cover & launder it when necessary. Never had a pet bed that met all the expectations that this bed has. Highly recommend!
authors_reviews.author: M

authors_reviews.title: Full bolstered sides
authors_reviews.text: This is the best dog bed of this style I’ve tried. The base is thick and supportive, and the bolstered sides are full and fluffy. It features a long, round bolster that fits into a zippered pocket, which feels much more durable than typical designs. I especially love the raised sides, they keep my floppy girl from sliding off while she sleeps, help contain her chew bones, and give her leverage while chewing. She’s currently 50 lbs and still growing, and the 42x30 size seems like a great long-term fit (though with her being half Great Pyrenees, we’ll see how big she gets!).My only complaint is the color, which is more of a personal preference. The “cool silver” tone reads cooler in person than it appears in the photos, so it didn’t blend as well with our warmer-toned room. I included a third photo comparing it to another gray bed for reference, the quality of this one is far superior, but the other color fits our space better.
authors_reviews.author: Experiencer1

authors_reviews.title: Great quality and perfect for larger dogs
authors_reviews.text: We purchased the Comfort Expression Orthopedic Dog Bed (45x35) and have been really impressed with the quality. The bed is heavy and feels very well-made, not flimsy at all. The foam seems supportive and holds its shape nicely.It works perfectly for our 75 lb Labrador and our 40 lb Golden Retriever puppy. There’s plenty of room, and both dogs seem very comfortable lounging and sleeping on it. It’s big enough for them to stretch out without feeling cramped.Overall, this is a sturdy, supportive bed that feels built to last. Definitely a great option for larger dogs!
authors_reviews.author: Katie

authors_reviews.title: She loves it.
authors_reviews.text: I love this dog bed, or shall I say that my dog loves this bed.It was very easy to assemble and it seems like it’s really good quality.It’s a great price compared to other ones that don’t seem to be as good.The photos that I’m submitting will say everything.
authors_reviews.author: D.T.

authors_reviews.title: Comfort and large enough for 2 big dogs or a big dog and 2 to 3 medium size dogs.
authors_reviews.text: My pups seem to never want to leave this bed. Wonderful look and comfort! EASY TO WASH! A little difficult to reassemble on your own. Wish this had an easier one person function.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Good quality dog bed
authors_reviews.text: This is a very nice quality dog bed. My only advice is to think about your dog's size (not weight) and sleeping preferences when deciding on which size bed to get. I went with the manufacturer's suggested size based on my dog's weight, and the bed is a bit too big for him. For some dogs that might not matter, but my dog prefers to feel cozily enclosed when he sleeps, and I think he'd prefer something smaller so he could feel better surrounded on all sides by the walls of the bed. I've experimented with remedying this by placing a large pillow on the bed, but I think ideally the bed would just be smaller.The bed has a nice soft texture, seems to be nice and warm, retains its shape well, and has help up nicely, but my dog hasn't been too rough with it (e.g. he doesn't chew it), so I can't say how it would hold up under heavier abuse.All in all a good quality bed – just try to be sure that you're getting the right size for your dog.
authors_reviews.author: Kaya

authors_reviews.title: XXL
authors_reviews.text: If you are going to invest in a dog bed, let it be this one. My dogs loves it. It is very comfortable and SUPER easy to wash! It has water proof liners over the cushions, which is why I originally purchased it. Definitely the best dog bed that I have ever purchased BY FAR.
authors_reviews.author: Hailey

authors_reviews.title: Dogs are happy with it
authors_reviews.text: Easy to put together, doesnt have any weird smell from the foam. I bought 2- one for each dog but they seem to prefer to lay together which this is big enough to house both dogs so im able to have one in the living room and one upstairs in the bedroom. The foam is thick enough to make the dogs comfortable. Havent had to clean it yet, but it seems like it will be easy as all you need to do is unzip it and throw it i to the washer. Will update if i find any issues with that. I like the design having the raised outer edging. The dogs seems to prefer to lay their heads on that part like a pillow. Id say it was a good purchase for the anount i paid. Was using a hefty memory foam bean bag before, these are a lot lighter and easier to move around.
authors_reviews.author: Dan

other_countries_reviews.title: Médiocre !
other_countries_reviews.text: 1 étoile pour la housse.Quant au matelas, totalement écrasé dans sa longueur sur la moitié de sa surface: un peu comme si vous deviez vous asseoir sur la moitié d’une assise de chaise ! Ne se remet pas en forme, n’a rien d’un mousse orthopédique. Les coussins de bords ne valent pas mieux: le rembourrage est fait de petits morceaux de mousse découpée, en trop faible quantité donc ne sont pas bien adaptés à la housse.Bref, qualité médiocre, je l’ai renvoyé. On peut même dire, de qui se moque-t-on?
other_countries_reviews.author: Ann

other_countries_reviews.title: Entrega pontual.
other_countries_reviews.text: Fiquei surpresa com a qualidade. Senti diferença quando meu cão idoso levanta da caminha., antes parecia todo travado. Material muito bom. Posso dizer que fiz ótima aquisição.
other_countries_reviews.author: MARIA CARMEN PARERAS SEGUNDO

other_countries_reviews.title: The dog sleeps through the night!
other_countries_reviews.text: Excellent bed for our Lab X. He's got loads of room and the foam and cover have held up for two years so far.
other_countries_reviews.author: Mrs Terri Keltie

other_countries_reviews.title: Very Happy with Quality and Bed.
other_countries_reviews.text: Great dog bed!!!I was so sick of buying dog beds that I can't wash every now and then and also wanted one to match the colour of my couch. This bed was a little more expensive but if I was to buy two dog beds it worked out the same cost. It was very simple to put together and I had no issues following instructions. It does say to put the arm rests in dryer for 20mins on low heat to help fluff them and I also ran my hands to fluff them a few times. This bed is fitting 2 cavapoo/cavoodles. One is 11kg/24lbs and the other is 6kg/13lbs for your comparison.
other_countries_reviews.author: jessica M

other_countries_reviews.title: My Golden Loves It!
other_countries_reviews.text: Looks very luxurious and it's so comfortable that my golden rolled around on it happily. It is as advertised and true to size. Not sure if the material will last if I put it into the washing machine though.
other_countries_reviews.author: paocharsiew
